title: Frontend Engineer Intern
description: Join Google's Frontend team to build accessible, beautiful, and high-performance interfaces. You will work alongside senior engineers to design and implement core search features.
responsibilities: Develop responsive and user-friendly web features using React and TypeScript.
Collaborate with UX designers to translate wireframes into pixel-perfect mockups.
Optimize website performance and browser loading times.
Participate in code reviews and learn development best practices.

title: React Developer
description: Stripe is looking for a React Developer to join our dashboard team. You will be responsible for creating highly secure, robust, and clean payment interfaces for millions of businesses worldwide.
responsibilities: Build modular, reusable frontend component libraries.
Ensure API integration flows are smooth and error-tolerant.
Participate in design sprints to conceptualize payment analytics visualizations.
Maintain high unit test coverage for frontend modules.
benefits: Premium health insurance and wellness stipends

title: UI/UX Developer
description: At Canva, we empower everyone to design. We are looking for a UI/UX Developer who bridges the gap between design and technology, creating smooth, interactive, and beautiful experiences.
responsibilities: Develop interactive web animations using Framer Motion and CSS transitions.
Maintain and expand Canva's design system tokens.
Build prototype interfaces for user testing and feedback loops.
Collaborate directly with designers to refine user flows.
benefits: Flexible working hours and hybrid options

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Airbnb is redefining travel. We need a Full Stack Developer to build search and booking engines for local experiences. You will own features end-to-end.
responsibilities: Design database models in MongoDB and write efficient backend queries.
Create scalable RESTful APIs with Node.js and Express.
Integrate complex search filters and maps on the React frontend.
Perform regular security and vulnerability assessments.

title: Software Engineering Intern
description: Join Slack's Core Workflow team. You will help build and polish internal tools that power integration pipelines for thousands of applications.
responsibilities: Fix bugs and implement minor user requests on Slack's admin dashboards.
Write scripts to automate development setup routines.
Contribute to technical documentation updates.
Gain exposure to enterprise-scale React workflows.

title: Mobile App Developer (React Native)
description: Spotify wants an expert Mobile App Developer to enhance the podcast delivery interface. You will focus on smooth audio rendering and offline downloads management.
responsibilities: Write cross-platform code optimized for iOS and Android.
Integrate native device capabilities for audio buffering.
Implement real-time synchronization of play states across devices.
Troubleshoot memory leaks and audio lag issues.
benefits: Health and mental wellness support plans

title: Backend Engineering Intern
description: Netflix is seeking a Backend Engineering Intern to join our personalization team. Help build backend algorithms that serve movie recommendations to 200M+ viewers.
responsibilities: Write clean, performant API endpoints in Node.js.
Construct relational database migrations and test SQL query efficiency.
Participate in Docker-based microservices packaging pipelines.
Perform code audits and refactor legacy server scripts.

title: Frontend Architect
description: Meta is looking for a Frontend Architect to drive core scalability for next-generation advertising dashboard interfaces. Help shape the future of business analytics.
responsibilities: Define standard project templates and lint parameters for 100+ developers.
Address bottleneck performance and design client-side data syncing schemas.
Refactor bloated codebases into micro-frontends.
Advise engineering leaders on technology adoption roadmaps.
benefits: Comprehensive global medical and dental support

title: Part-Time Web Developer
description: Looking for a flexible part-time developer to build landing pages and update portfolio sites for incubating tech startups. Ideal for students.
responsibilities: Create aesthetic landing pages for early stage startups.
Integrate newsletter signups and contact forms.
Maintain and update content directories.
Ensure web layouts are mobile responsive.
benefits: Valuable exposure to multiple early stage businesses

title: UI Developer Contract
description: Figma is looking for a UI Developer on a 6-month contract basis to help implement custom collaborative features inside Figma design spaces.
responsibilities: Build interactive dashboard components under strict design system guidelines.
Work closely with product managers to test and polish collaborative design features.
Write unit tests for UI interactions.
Identify and debug cross-browser layout inconsistencies.
benefits: Work in a world-class collaborative design culture
Contract extension possibilities based on output
